des: Blue Jays challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Brent Rooker reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Andrés Giménez. Tyler Soderstrom to 3rd.
Tyler Soderstrom doubles (1) on a fly ball to left fielder Davis Schneider. Nick Kurtz scores.
Alejandro Kirk challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Jeff McNeil called out on strikes.
Shea Langeliers singles on a line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Nick Kurtz to 3rd.
Denzel Clarke called out on strikes.
Carlos Cortes pops out to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
Jeff McNeil grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Jacob Wilson lines out to left fielder Davis Schneider.
Tyler Soderstrom singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho.
Shea Langeliers pops out to second baseman Ernie Clement.
